## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and which issue is fixed. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality within Level 2 scope)
- [ ] Documentation update (README, docs/, architecture)
- [ ] UI/UX improvement (responsive adjustments, loading indicators, styling)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project.
- [ ] I have run ESLint and resolved all warnings (`npm run lint`).
- [ ] If changing contracts, I have added unit tests to verify changes and run `cargo test`.
- [ ] I have verified the frontend locally in both Mock and Wallet-Connected modes.
- [ ] My changes do not modify the core business logic or exceed Level 2 requirements.

## Testing Screenshots / Recordings

Please attach screenshots or recordings showing the updated interface or test console outputs.
